visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Chaining Error
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Fix the constructor chaining logic. In Java, 'this()' must be the very first statement in a constructor.

solution.explanation: Java enforces that constructor chaining (using 'this()' or 'super()') occurs as the absolute first line of code in a constructor to ensure the object is properly initialized before any other logic runs.
